boundary_metrics.reason: Deferred in first-pass implementation; stage-native logical audit is primary.

metric_semantics.circuit_hash: Hash of the stage-prefix logical-unit manifest, not a transpiled boundary circuit hash.
metric_semantics.delta_energy_from_previous: Stage-local reference/prefix energy lowering: previous_energy - current_prefix_energy.
metric_semantics.energy_full_minus_unit: Stage-local exact energy after removing this unit from the final stage structure at fixed final parameters.
metric_semantics.energy_gain_per_2q: delta_energy_from_previous divided by unit_logical_2q_count when unit_logical_2q_count > 0.
metric_semantics.energy_prefix: Stage-local exact energy after applying accepted units up to this point with final fixed parameters.
metric_semantics.logical_2q_count: Cumulative stage-prefix logical two-qubit proxy count based on stage-native polynomial support widths; not transpiled hardware counts.
metric_semantics.logical_depth: Cumulative stage-prefix logical depth proxy = count of stage-native polynomial exponentials in the prefix.
